basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Counsellor and Data Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bathinda
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Bathinda is recruiting 3 contractual posts under the ATF project. Candidates with relevant qualifications in Psychology/Clinical Psychology or Computer Applications can apply. Last date to fill Google Form is 05 August 2026.

application_fee.details: Application fee must be paid online via SBI Collect before submitting the Google Form. | Payment Link: https://www.onlinesbi.sbi/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=2322756

age_limit.details: Cutoff date: 05 August 2026 | No age relaxation for reserved categories applying against UR vacancies.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all conditions as on 05 August 2026. Only Indian Nationals are eligible.
qualification.education_qualification: As mentioned in vacancy table (must possess on or before 05 Aug 2026)
qualification.experience: Required for Counsellor (minimum 2 years post M.Phil.)

selection_process: Selection will be based on Walk-in Interview after document verification. Mere fulfillment of eligibility does not guarantee selection. The institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on qualifications
Document Verification: On the day of interview at AIIMS Bathinda. Interview: For eligible candidates only. Interview may extend to next day if needed.
how_to_apply: Fill the Google Form by 05 August 2026: https://forms.gle/ZQABVdARgPndF7vLA
Pay the application fee via SBI Collect and note transaction details.
Download and fill the application proforma from the website.
Bring the hard copy of the application form, fee receipt, all original documents, and self-attested copies on the interview date.
Appear for document verification and interview at Ground Floor, Admin Block, Medical College Building, AIIMS Bathinda.
No hard copy needs to be sent by post.
important_instructions: This is a purely contractual engagement with no claim for regular appointment. No TA/DA or accommodation will be provided. Candidates must maintain confidentiality of project/patient data. The institute can terminate the contract anytime if performance is unsatisfactory or project ends. Visit the official AIIMS Bathinda website regularly for any updates/corrigendum. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: AIIMS Bathinda has issued Recruitment Notification No. AIIMS/BTI/RC/ATF/2367 dated 16 July 2026 for engagement of personnel purely on contractual basis under the Addiction Treatment Facility (ATF) established under the National Action Plan for Drug Demand Reduction (NAPDDR), supported by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment (MoSJE), Government of India and coordinated by the National Drug Dependence Treatment Centre (NDDTC), AIIMS, New Delhi. The engagement is initially for one year or till continuation of the project. Candidates are advised to read the full notification carefully before applying. Download AIIMS Bathinda ATF Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: AIIMS Bathinda is recruiting 3 contractual posts under the ATF project. Candidates with relevant qualifications in Psychology/Clinical Psychology or Computer Applications can apply. Last date to fill Google Form is 05 August 2026.

rows.event: Last Date for Google Form Submission

rows.date: On the day of Walk-in Interview

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 03 contractual posts have been announced under the ATF project. Vacancies are UR category only. The number of posts is provisional and may vary as per project requirements. Note: Candidates belonging to OBC/SC/ST can apply but no reservation/relaxation is applicable for these UR posts.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all conditions as on 05 August 2026. Only Indian Nationals are eligible.

rows.details: As mentioned in vacancy table (must possess on or before 05 Aug 2026)
Required for Counsellor (minimum 2 years post M.Phil.)
As per post (relaxation for PwBD: 10 years)
Must submit NOC from present employer at interview

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Cutoff date: 05 August 2026 No age relaxation for reserved categories applying against UR vacancies.

rows.age_limit: 10 years relaxation in upper age limit

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee must be paid online via SBI Collect before submitting the Google Form. Payment Link: https://www.onlinesbi.sbi/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=2322756

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on Walk-in Interview after document verification. Mere fulfillment of eligibility does not guarantee selection. The institute reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on qualifications, experience, and suitability. Document Verification: On the day of interview at AIIMS Bathinda. Interview: For eligible candidates only. Interview may extend to next day if needed.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the Google Form by 05 August 2026: https://forms.gle/ZQABVdARgPndF7vLA Pay the application fee via SBI Collect and note transaction details. Download and fill the application proforma from the website. Bring the hard copy of the application form, fee receipt, all original documents, and self-attested copies on the interview date. Appear for document verification and interview at Ground Floor, Admin Block, Medical College Building, AIIMS Bathinda. No hard copy needs to be sent by post.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for AIIMS Bathinda Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: This is a purely contractual engagement with no claim for regular appointment. No TA/DA or accommodation will be provided. Candidates must maintain confidentiality of project/patient data. The institute can terminate the contract anytime if performance is unsatisfactory or project ends. Visit the official AIIMS Bathinda website regularly for any updates/corrigendum. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bathinda Counsellor and Data Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to fill the Google Form is 05 August 2026 by 05:00 PM. Candidates must complete the online form and pay the fee before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in AIIMS Bathinda ATF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 03 vacancies – 2 for Counsellor (UR) and 1 for Data Manager (UR).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Counsellor post at AIIMS Bathinda?
faq.answer: The consolidated remuneration for Counsellor is Rs. 56,100/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Data Manager post in AIIMS Bathinda 2026?
faq.answer: Graduate degree in any discipline with one-year diploma in Computer Application OR Graduate in Computer Science/IT. Higher qualifications are preferred. Maximum age is 60 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for PwBD candidates in AIIMS Bathinda recruitment?
faq.answer: No, Persons with Benchmark Disabilities are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bathinda ATF posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 10 August 2026 from 08:30 AM onwards at AIIMS Bathinda.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience mandatory for Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have at least 2 years of experience after M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology.

faq.question: Q8. Can government employees apply for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: Yes, but they must produce a valid No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their current employer at the time of interview.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be any written test or only interview?
faq.answer: Selection is based on document verification followed by Walk-in Interview. No written test is mentioned.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job or contractual?
faq.answer: This is a purely contractual engagement for one year under the ATF project. There is no claim for regular/permanent absorption in AIIMS Bathinda.
